name: @centraid/analytics
description: Centraid's Insights domain — central push-based run summaries (AnalyticsStore, the RunSummarySink the ledger writes through), the read-only aggregation that powers the Insights screen (InsightsStore), and the centraid-analytics.sqlite migration ladder. Depends one-way on @centraid/app-engine for the DatabaseProvider seam, the RunSummary contract, and the shared SQLite-open helper; app-engine never depends back.
